notes: Existing text-field appearance stream remains authoritative.
Existing checkbox appearance-state dictionary renders natively.
Existing radio on-state appearance renders natively.
`/V` differs from the existing normal appearance stream; native renders the embedded appearance.
`/V /Yes` differs from `/AS /Off`; native renders the selected `/AS` appearance.
Missing text-field appearance uses bounded deterministic thumbnail synthesis.
Missing choice-field appearance uses bounded deterministic thumbnail synthesis.
Missing checkbox appearance uses bounded deterministic thumbnail synthesis.
Missing radio appearance uses bounded deterministic thumbnail synthesis.
